name: Caramel Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add condensed milk and vanilla extract to the mixture.
3. Beat in the egg and mix well with the dry ingredients: baking powder, baking soda, grated coconut, and cornflakes.
4. Pour the batter onto a cold tray, spreading it evenly.
5. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
